name: VCBMultiplayer
description: Cooperative peer-to-peer multiplayer for Virtual Circuit Board, on the original game engine. Two players connect (ENet, UPnP on UDP 6777) and edit a shared board together in real time - drawing, selection, cursor, camera, undo/redo, bucket fills and in-simulation latch/button presses all stay in sync. Runtime Mod Loader port of the vcb-mp mod.
